About Us

One PTA serving Frazer Middle School and Frazer High School.

One PTA serving both campuses. All Frazer middle and high school families and staff are welcome.

Shared mission

We partner with Frazer School staff and families to fund programs, organize events, and advocate for resources that help students at both the middle school and high school thrive.

More details coming soon

We are updating this page with current PTA information for both campuses.

© 2025 Frazer School PTA. All rights reserved.

Serving Frazer Middle School and Frazer High School. Maintained by parent volunteers.
